# GitHub Copilot instructions — Mycosoft CUI hardline

GitHub and Copilot are outside Mycosoft's CUI boundary. Generate code only from public/non-CUI source, business data, and compliance metadata. Do not accept or reproduce CUI, CTI, CDI, export-controlled technical data, marked `CUI//...` content, covered-contract technical content, credentials, or private keys. On uncertainty, stop and direct the user to PreVeil and Morgan Rockcoons (SAO). Never state that Mycosoft is CMMC compliant or mark a control Met without an evidence URI and SAO validation. Government portal submissions require a human. Use Morgan Rockcoons (SAO), RJ Ricasata (CFO), Mycosoft, LLC as contracting/CMMC entity, and Mycosoft, Inc. as sole-member parent. Follow `AGENTS.md` and policy SHA-256 `350442fb938e5e14114817e7ddfc08a16ecb84bf3a50b705977b4a68655beb19`.
